entry.note: <L>7<pc>1-0003<k1>aMSa<k2>a/MSa<h>1 1. {#a/MSa#}¦ (s. <is>gaṇa</is> {#vfzAdi#}) <lex>m.</lex> <ls>SIDDH. K. 249,b, ult.</ls> <div n="1"> 1) {%Theil%} <ls>AK. 2,9,90.</ls> <ls>H. 1434.</ls> <div n="2">— a) {%Theil, Abschnitt%} <ls>H. an. 2,542.</ls> ({#ekadeSe vastunaH#}): {#zoqaSoM 'SaH#} ({#candrasya#}) {#kalA#} {%der 16te Theil (des Mondes) heisst%} <is>kalā</is> <ls>H. 106.</ls> {#tUryaMSa#} {%der 4te Theil%} <ls>AK. 3,4,92.</ls> {#aMSo 'zwamo 'hniH#} {%der 8te Abschnitt, die%} [Page1-0004] {%8te Stunde des%} (15stündigen) {%Tages%} <ls>AK. 2,7,31.</ls> {#zazWamaMSaM pradadyAtpEtfkAdDanAt#} {%den 6ten Theil gebe er vom väterlichen Vermögen%} <ls>M. 9,164.</ls> {#mamEvAMSaH#} {%ein Theil von mir%} <ls>BHAG. 15,7.</ls> <div n="2">— b) {%ein Theil des Kaufpreises, Haftgeld%}: {#A na\stuja^M ra\yiM Ba\rAMSa\M na pra^tijAna\te#} <ls>ṚV. 3,45,4.</ls> <div n="2">— c) {%Antheil%}: {#udinnva^sya ricyate\ aMSo\ Dana\M na ji\gyuza^H#} <ls>ṚV. 7,32,12.</ls> {#aDA^yi DI\tirasa^sfgra\maMSA^H#} <ls n="ṚV.">10,31,3.</ls> <ls>AV. 11,1,5.</ls> {#taddAsEreva dAtavyaM svatoM 'SataH#} <ls>M. 8,408.</ls> {%Erbschaftsantheil%}: {#anaMSO klIvapatitO#} <ls>M. 9,201.</ls> {#niraMSaka#} {%ohne Erbtheil bleibend%} <ls>YĀJÑ. 2,140.</ls> {#patnyaH kAryAH samAMSikAH#} <ls n="YĀJÑ.">2,115.</ls> <div n="2">— d) {%Partei%}: {#a\smAka\maMSa\muda^vA\ Bare^ Bare#} <ls>ṚV. 1,102,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">112,1.</ls> <div n="2">— e) {%Nenner eines Bruchs%} <ls>COLEBR. Alg. 13.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) {%Theilung, Erbschaftstheilung%} <ls>H. an. 2,542.</ls> {#(viBAjane): sakfda ... [truncated]

<L>6<pc>1-001-a<k1>aMSa<k2>a/MSa {#a/MSa#}¦ <lex>m.</lex> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%Theil:%} {#svAMSatas#} <ls n="Chr.">139,1</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%Antheil, Erbtheil%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%Einsatz bei Wetten%} <ls>ṚV. 5,86,5</ls>. <ls>TĀṆḌYA-BR. 25,13,3</ls>. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%Partei%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%Grad eines Kreises%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 *{%Tag%} <ls>GAL.</ls> <div n="1">— 7〉 <ab>N. pr.</ab> eines <is>Āditya</is>. <LEND>
